steps: Download and install the PPSSPP emulator from the ROMs section.
Download your desired PSP game in .ISO or .CSO format.
Create a folder named 'PSP' on your storage, and a subfolder named 'GAME' inside it.
Move your game files into the 'PSP/GAME' folder.
Open PPSSPP, navigate to the 'Games' tab, and locate your PSP/GAME folder.
Tap the game icon to start playing!
tips: Use .CSO format to save storage space.
Set 'Rendering Resolution' to 2x or higher for HD graphics if your device is powerful.

steps: Install AetherSX2 from the official link.
Obtain a PS2 BIOS file (required for legal reasons, usually named scphXXXX.bin).
Download your PS2 games in .ISO or .CHD format.
Open AetherSX2 and follow the setup wizard to select your BIOS file.
Point the app to your games folder.
Select a game and enjoy PS2 classics on your phone!
tips: Use .CHD format to compress large PS2 games without losing quality.
Vulkan renderer is usually faster than OpenGL on modern Android devices.
Enable 'Affinity Control' if you have a multi-core processor.

steps: Download DuckStation for your platform.
Get the PS1 BIOS (e.g., scph5501.bin).
Download games in .BIN/.CUE or .CHD format.
In DuckStation settings, set the BIOS directory and select your BIOS file.
Add your game directory to the library.
Launch the game and use PGXP settings for enhanced 3D graphics.
tips: Enable PGXP 'Texture Correction' to fix wobbly PS1 textures.
Use 'Internal Resolution Scale' to play PS1 games in 1080p or 4K.
Save states are your best friend for difficult retro games.

steps: Install Dolphin Emulator.
Download GameCube (.ISO/.GCZ) or Wii (.ISO/.WBFS) games.
Open Dolphin and tap the '+' button to add your games folder.
For Wii games, you may need to configure the 'Emulated Wii Remote'.
Launch the game and adjust graphics settings per-game for best performance.
tips: Use 'Skip EFB Access from CPU' to speed up many games.
Shader Compilation: Use 'Asynchronous (Ubershaders)' to eliminate stuttering.
WBFS is the best format for Wii games as it removes 'junk' data.
